title: Unidentified clone commando squad (Atin)

|founded=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="BD">''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' states that [[Niner Skirata|RC-1309]] was ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old at the time of the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and the creation of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], meaning that RC-3222—as well as RC-3222's [[Squad/Legends|squad]]—must have been [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] in 32 BBY.</ref>

{{Quote|I've been the last man left standing in two squads now.|Atin|<ref name="BD" />}}
A '''squad''' of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] was part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] at the opening of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Galactic Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Trained by ''[[Cuy'val Dar]]'' [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Walon Vau]], the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was made up of four [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], including [[Atin Skirata|Atin]]. The unit was deployed with many other commando units in the first [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] of the Clone Wars on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], where all but [[Atin Skirata|Atin]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action.

==History==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="BD" /> the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] was [[Cloning/Legends|created]]<ref name="RC:HC" /> on the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to serve in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]]. The unit consisted of four troopers, including [[Atin Skirata|Atin]], and trained under [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Walon Vau]], who was handpicked by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to be a member of the ''[[Cuy'val Dar]]''. Vau was a brutal instructor who was known to physically punish his commando charges, and constantly stressed the importance of equipment on his troops.<ref name="RC:HC" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the squad was deployed along with many other [[Commando/Legends|commando]] units to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet<ref name="TEA" /> [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in the opening [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] of the Clone Wars between the Galactic Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The unit sustained heavy [[Death/Legends|casualties]] during the battle, leaving Atin as the only survivor. The remaining commando was assigned to [[Omega Squad]] three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later. Upon first impressions with the other members of Omega, all of whom were also the only survivors of their original squads, Sergeant [[Niner Skirata|RC-1309]] "Niner" speculated that the squad must have been a miserable group, training under a miserable instructor. As tensions within the squad eased, Atin expressed to Niner his guilt at surviving without his former squadmates to the squad leader.<ref name="RC:HC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The squad was mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:HC" /> In a [[2005]] discussion forum on [[StarWars.com]], Traviss stated that in her notes for ''Hard Contact'' that RC-3222's original squad was named "Prudii Squad," but the name did not appear in the novel itself.<ref name="SWBs">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=239051&start=15#13161930|thread=Ask Karen...(Karen Traviss approved)|user=[[Karen Traviss]]|date=2005-10-29|time=1:04 AM|quote=In my notes (and that means this isn't official, remember) Niner's old squad was Lambda, Fi's was Teroch and Atin's was Prudii.}}</ref>
